title: Diplazium subsinuatum

The classification of Diplazium subsinuatum is further divided into several taxonomic ranks, including kingdom, phylum, class, and order.

This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as the potential to lower cholesterol levels and reduce blood pressure.
